notes: Model routes for bin/claude-via — copy to ~/.claude/model-routes.json and edit. Each route names a model Claude Code launches with; 'baseUrl' points ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL at a Claude-API-compatible proxy (e.g. CLIProxyAPI) for non-Anthropic models — omit it for Anthropic-native models. 'subagentModel' defaults to 'model' so subagents stay on-proxy (a proxied session whose subagents default elsewhere would send a foreign model id to Anthropic). 'env' carries extra per-route knobs verbatim. NEVER put tokens here: export ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN via ~/.claude/.envrc (direnv). Convention 12: author pipeline/profiles/<model>.md per route — without it, sessions fall back to the conservative opus-4-8 posture. See docs/multi-model-support.md.
